mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_sensor_data(device_id, temperature, humidity, pressure, smoke_density, dew_point, luminance, extra_info, report_time) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{pressure}, #{smokeDensity}, #{dewPoint}, #{luminance}, #{extraInfo}, #{reportTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_sensor_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY report_time DESC
SELECT * FROM iot_sensor_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_sensor_data WHERE report_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
